instruction.title: UI Architecture Specification
instruction.overview: This document dictates the structural classification of UI components, composition patterns, data streams, and component configurations.

level.name: Primitives
level.description: Essential single style components. Never import other components.
level.list: Button, Card, Badge, Icon, Container, Section

level.name: Composites
level.description: Assembled from primitives. Control sub-layouts but not navigation.

level.name: Sections
level.description: Major viewport layouts. Sibling sections never communicate.
level.list: Navbar, Hero, Problem, Solution, FeatureShowcase, BentoAccordion, Testimonials, PricingPanel, FAQ, Footer

composition_rules.rule: Downwards-only importing: Page -> Section -> Composite -> Primitive.

component.name: BentoAccordion
component.animation: CSS grid on desktop, max-height accordion on mobile

primitive.name: Button
primitive.inputs: style (primary, secondary, link), status (enabled, disabled), SVG icon
primitive.performance: CSS-bound. No JS state compile on styling.

composite.name: FAQCard
composite.a11y: Uses details/summary native elements for progressive enhancement.

section.name: PricingPanel
section.a11y: polite aria-live announcements for screen readers on selection changes.
section.performance: State boundary; isolates pricing calculations to prevent layout re-renders.
